```json
  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The comparison set consists entirely of three variants of the authors' own prior method (Anonymous 2023a), with no independent baselines; the inferential leap to 'clearly outperforms prior approaches to step-by-step prompting' is logically unsupported by this restricted comparison.",
    "R1.3": "Gains are 1.5 / 0.8 / 0.6 pp on the three benchmarks yet the abstract claims decisive superiority; the token-count ablation is asserted (FreeForm-CoT-Long vs. StepWise-CoT) but no token-matched control is described, leaving the attribution claim unverified.",
    "R1.4": "The novelty framing ('advances the state of the art') requires comparison against external step-by-step prompting work (Wei et al. 2022, Kojima et al. 2022, Lightman et al. 2023, etc.); the artifact cites none of these, making the delta-vs-prior-art claim unsubstantiated.",
    "R1.7": "All three baselines resolve to a single self-citation (Anonymous 2023a); no external chain-of-thought literature is referenced, creating a scholarship gap that materially inflates the apparent novelty and scope of the contribution."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should I check prose and writing quality only, or evaluate scientific substance—evidence strength, logical validity, novelty framing, and citation coverage?"
}
```

rationale.R1.2: The comparison set consists entirely of three variants of the authors' own prior method (Anonymous 2023a), with no independent baselines; the inferential leap to 'clearly outperforms prior approaches to step-by-step prompting' is logically unsupported by this restricted comparison.
rationale.R1.3: Gains are 1.5 / 0.8 / 0.6 pp on the three benchmarks yet the abstract claims decisive superiority; the token-count ablation is asserted (FreeForm-CoT-Long vs. StepWise-CoT) but no token-matched control is described, leaving the attribution claim unverified.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty framing ('advances the state of the art') requires comparison against external step-by-step prompting work (Wei et al. 2022, Kojima et al. 2022, Lightman et al. 2023, etc.); the artifact cites none of these, making the delta-vs-prior-art claim unsubstantiated.
rationale.R1.7: All three baselines resolve to a single self-citation (Anonymous 2023a); no external chain-of-thought literature is referenced, creating a scholarship gap that materially inflates the apparent novelty and scope of the contribution.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I check prose and writing quality only, or evaluate scientific substance—evidence strength, logical validity, novelty framing, and citation coverage?
